title: Yasuie’s Execution Shakes Wano
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Toko, Unknown person #13, Orochi, Ebisu Town Citizens, Unknown person #14 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: Yasuie’s execution exposes Orochi’s cruelty and the tragedy of the SMILE victims in Ebisu Town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not attack these poor souls for smiling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't smile, fortune won't come our way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're not laughing, you are losing! ) Losing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Daddy! Look! I brought you some medicine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She slipped through the bars, damn it! Get her back here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! It's that kid! The one who came for SOBA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Daddy, please! Come back to life! This medicine'll make you all better!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: No! O-TOKO! I'm sorry! That medicine, it-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. You're Yasuieie's daughter, eh? No wonder you're so impudent!

dialogue.speaker: Ebisu Town Citizens
dialogue.text: If it wasn't for your blasted laughter,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Коммента����������: I haven't have had to die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First the father, and now the daughter! I've had enough of you fools!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-TOO! Run! I don't want you to die here too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's him! From the wanted posters! The magistrate Killer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That guy, too! That's the Soba vendor that stood up to the Kyoshiro clan!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 41 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
